meta.label: FreestyleFly 结构化词库 · 摄影

entries.title: Realistic Photography
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Lens, lighting, film texture, and documentary-style photo prompts.

Specify camera distance, lens, light source, texture, background, and motion.
Use believable imperfections for documentary realism.
Avoid over-polished plastic skin unless commercial beauty is required.
Add negative constraints for hands, text, and anatomy when needed.
entries.description: Lens, lighting, film texture, and documentary-style photo prompts.
entries.descriptionZh: 控制镜头、光线、胶片质感和纪实摄影效果。
entries.promptZh:
控制镜头、光线、胶片质感和纪实摄影效果。

指定机位、镜头、光源、质感、背景和动作。
加入可信的小瑕疵增强纪实感。
商业美妆之外,避免过度磨皮。
需要时加入手部、文字、结构类负面约束。
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的摄影条目《写实摄影》。 关键词：Photography、Realistic、Fashion、Commerce。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。

entries.title: Street Accident Moment
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Realistic phone-photo scenes with negative constraints.

Describe the exact moment, camera height, motion blur, and street context.
Add negative constraints for staged poses and fake ad lighting.
Avoid too-clean compositions.
Keep the event plausible and grounded.
entries.description: Realistic phone-photo scenes with negative constraints.
entries.descriptionZh: 生成手机纪实风街头瞬间,并加入负面约束。
entries.promptZh:
生成手机纪实风街头瞬间,并加入负面约束。

描述具体瞬间、机位高度、运动模糊和街景。
加入避免摆拍和广告棚拍感的限制。
避免画面过于干净。
让事件看起来可信。
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的摄影条目《街头意外瞬间摄影》。 关键词：Photography、Realistic、Travel、Social。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。
